权限管理展示平台所有权限码层级结构: Permission management displays the hierarchical structure of all platform permission codes for viewing and understanding the system permission architecture.
平台全部权限数据由种子数据维护: All platform permission data is maintained by seed data.
权限数据由系统种子数据管理仅供查看: Permission data is managed by system seed data and is read-only.
搜索权限编码或名称: Search by permission code or name
进入权限管理页面查看权限层级结构: Enter the permission management page to view the permission hierarchy
使用搜索框按权限编码或名称筛选: Use the search box to filter by permission code or name
展开折叠树节点查看子权限: Expand/collapse tree nodes to view child permissions
权限编码唯一标识格式为模块资源操作: Permission code is a unique identifier in the format: module.resource.action
权限类型菜单权限控制页面可见性API权限控制接口: Permission types: menu permissions control page visibility, API permissions control interface access
路径和方法仅API权限类型显示: Path and method are only displayed for API permission types
权限数据由系统种子数据管理无法直接修改: Permission data is managed by system seed data and cannot be modified directly
